   "reasoning": "I'm scared that my family will pull me out of school because of the financial pressure, so I think scholarships and counseling are crucial - they directly help students like me. I also want to see more teachers and staff hired, so we don't have such large class sizes and can get the attention we need. Transparency reports don't seem to do much for me or my family, so I don't think they're a priority.",
